description: Fast checkout. Easy and working integration with marketing tools.
author: Hristo K.
pros: It integrates easily with lots of other products (Google Analitycs, Facebook and FB Pixel, Zapier and others). It's easy to use and customisable. It has very responsive and helpful support.
cons: It still lacks same functionality as some of it's competitors. Some times there are problems with updates to newer versions.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: People can order faster and easier - only via internet
author: Georgi Y.
pros: It is easy to learn and use, it works fast
cons: the options change often and the way you can to do same action - for example, it was hard to find how to change the main picture of the site - this option (and not only) was changed several times. Also the design. Change is good, but not when people get used to some things.

author: Pavel N.
pros: Easy to setup a new online store for few hours.
cons: Plugins do not work property. I reported for the issue, before more half of year, but still not any action by cloudcart to fix the issue with OLX.

review_title: E-commerce solution with great potential, but still needs more work on it;
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Great customer support, team is always helpful and respond quickly; - Admin dashboard is very easy to learn and use, no code skills are needed for end-users;
cons: - Lack of essential features like manual ordering of products in the catalog; - Multi-language localization of front-end is not available for free, each language version is counted as a separate e-shop; - One-click Facebook shop feature (https://cloudcart.com/bg/feature/facebook) is not functioning at the current moment;
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Petko P.
pros: Easy to add products. Easy to create personal design. Good SEO position after 6 mounth.
cons: No quick order, only check out. When a new order recieve, and click on it opens product edit. I think must open product page to view product details. No options to make discount price just in product editing.

review_title: Been using it last 9 months, good platform with a lot of functionalities.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The keep updating it and adding new features. It's really user friendly, have a lot of tutorials on how to use it.
cons: You don't have the possibility to upload and modify on server sidre. If you're advanced user you would need access to upload some things there.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use, Great customer support, All eCommerce tools out of the box, Free themes, Free extensions, Great value for money
cons: Could have better extensions documentation, Could have a more clear and straight approach to multi-language, Really needs theme code editing, Missing Developers Platform for creating additional apps and extensions

review_title: I am a client of CloudCart Bulgaria using their platform for my online shop.
author: Victoria T.
pros: The ease of use of the software, its intuitiveness and the fact that you do not have to be IT to understand and apply it on everyday base.
cons: What I don't like are the things I cannot manage by myself, BUT what I can't do the Cloudcart Bulgaria Team does it, so everything is OK.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy of use, Perfect quality, Excellent support.
author: Zahary A.
pros: Easy to use, Perfect quality, Excellent support. The best software in the Bulgarian market. Take care of their customers in the best way.
cons: More time is needed to learn and use platform options. I'm having difficulty fitting the size of banners and photos.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's a one-stop shop for everything that is ecommerce, but only as long as the user adopts their way of doing ecommerce. It's biggest perk is the SEO capabilities and pre-built themes, the biggest downsizes are the bad webpage builder and the limited design settings. I wouldn't recommend it.
author: Kalin D.
pros: The extensive SEO settings, the one size fits all pre-built themes and the excellent customer support. It's easy to deploy if you don't want to customize the design at all.
cons: The webpage builder is easily the worst in the field. It's very hard to change the design layout. It's User Interface is not similar to anything the industry is using at the moment and it has a longer learning curve than it's competitors.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Really easy to set up. Very good support. Highly reliable software!
description: I can set up a website very quickly and I love the available social integration!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to work with, reliable support, highly customizable and a lot of free themes! It is among the best here (Bulgaria).
cons: Can't find any cons till now. It serves my needs,I am working with free themes and add-ons. I like the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing with two words FIND All I need - these guys are really professionals
author: Ivaylo B.
pros: This soft I need a lot and after huge research in the net space I find it just here just right now on that price - ohh it is amazing Thanks
cons: As always the thing going in their right course no matter the circumstances I hope the team put a lot effort and make the soft perfect decision for each of us.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The software is very easy to work with, I mean I got the logic in the menus and I work well, just a month after I started using it. I happily recommend it to my friends!
author: Petya M.
pros: I like that I can find anything I need, really from Accounting up to Yoga.
cons: It offers so many options that sometimes I forget what I was looking for in the beginning.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: This is really easy to use platform for my online store
description: I'm very happy to find and work with CloudCart platform, because they help me to create my online store in 5 days. Right now they help me and supporting my ads in facebook!
author: Nikolay I.

description: It is very easy to do the settings; very convenient to connect to Facebook; and the price is the best! I wish if it was visible in Pages manager mobile application
author: Violeta M.

review_title: Money machine / Amazing design / Fast support / Platform for winners!!!
description: Strongly recommend! Very user friendly interface! Competitive prices! Powerful tools and everything that you need to sell and earn successfully!
author: Andrea P.

review_title: Best way to be a seller
description: I had a online store , but when i try cloudcart i was frustrated how easy can be a seller with this. You must try.
author: Kristiyan K.

description: Great product! Easy to use, with great customer support. Helpful and timely. I will recommend to anyone!
author: Pavel P.

description: I bought software 2 years ago I was very exiting at the begining, but now i lost myself in so many functionals:)
author: IVAN K.
pros: The interface of product is very friendly Its a easy of use
cons: May be the least is costumer support and non languial interface I want to use my store in 2 languages, but there is no way

review_title: Great place to stay your online store!
description: The people at CloudCart are real professionals. They adjusted to our needs and developed modules specifically needed for our business. As a large enterpise our needs are a lot different than smaller shops and they adapted brialliantly. All our demands and questions were professionally handled. Best of all the price is extremely low for what they offer. You can really control every aspect of your online store, from product and category pages to how your store looks. Anyone can work on the platform. The interface is amazing and they provide a wide range of pre-designed tamplates that are simply gorgeous.
author: George S.
pros: Ease of use, price and funcationality. Truly versatile.
cons: Like any software there are things missing, however, I cannot point any specific con, because anything we needed, Cloudcart listened and got it done!

author: Antonio S.
pros: Support 24/7, constant improvement and development, additional functionalities
cons: Some functionalities should be for free and not paid - for example GDPR

description: We started good, Cloudcart representatives helped me to establish the webshop. After this initial kick off I didnt get proper support. I figured out that the initial product upload is done with pictures downloaded from internet, probably without copyright, although I ask for this explicitly.
author: Nikolay U.
pros: Predefined features and plug and play apps
cons: Lack of second language Poor attitude towards customers Missing of ability to display some detials on the webshop

description: I'm already working with a third year cloudcard and I think everything is fine.
author: kalin I.
pros: Easy work on the platform and good support
cons: I can not remember. Perhaps there should be more training videos for additional apps, how they work and how they will be useful to our store

description: We started to use Cloudcart based on my personal contacts with customer support. We fully believed that everything will be as easy as we were told to be. Me and my partner do not have any experience with building web stores from scratch. The problems started from the moment of payment. We paid annual subscription. From that moment ahead the support level dropped down signifantly. All questions for help were answered with delay, complexity containing techincal data which we can not use - especially the part with setting the domain, mailbox etc. We are sales guys, not an IT specs. In every step ahead we faced difficulties in communication - at the begining we were told that there is a free SEO included - it is written on their website. Now they told us - we have to pay for it. Technical issues are constant: wrong invoicing to the end consumer, no intergration with Facebook, no integrtation with post service. We have raised the topics and every time same answer received - we know, we are working on it. What e-shop could be if we have to purchase every time courier to take the goods? I think it is quite enough so far.
author: Ivaylo N.
pros: Price
cons: the ease of use
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to use. Good interface. Nice support and access to tools that they provide you with. An east solution for fast building website.
cons: For me is the price. Hope that they will take a note and will make the price lower (at least for Eastern Europe is a little bit higher).
